title: Extraction Protocol for untargeted LC-MS/MS - Urine
author: Mauricio Caraballo

steps_raw.instruction: Start with urine sample 25-200 µL and transfer to empty sample tube.

Add extraction solvent in a 1:4 sample:solvent ratio. For instance, 200 µL sample, add 800 µL of prechilled extraction solvent to each sample. For low volume samples, e.g., 25uL, add 100 µL of prechilled extraction solvent to each sample. For a 200 µL volume sample, add 800 µL of prechilled extraction solvent to each sample. Final concentration of 80% MeOH is required.
Mix samples using a vortexer for 00:00:02 .
Place samples at -20 °C for 00:20:00 to aid in protein precipitation.
Centrifuge the samples at 2000 rpm, 4 °C, for 00:05:00 to pellet the protein precipitate. If possible, perform this step at 4 °C .

In case of low volume samples (e.g., 25 uL from mice), transfer 100 uL. Transfer 800 µL of supernatant per sample into wells of the pre-labeled 96-Well DeepWell. Remainder can be stored at -80 °C . In case of low volume samples (e.g., 25 uL urine with 100 uL extraction solvent), transfer 100 uL of centrifuged sample to pre-labeled 96-Well DeepWell.
Dry samples using a centrifugal low pressure system (Centrivap). Drying time may vary but it is recommended to check the progress every 4 hrs.
Cover your plate using a 96-Well DeepWell Plate compatible cover and store at -80 °C once dry.
Re-suspend plates with 250 µL of a 50% MeOH to water solution containing 1 micromolar (µM) of sulfadimethoxine as an internal standard.
Urine (biological sample) Minimum volume: 25uL. This is an average volume of urine obtained from mice. For human samples, typically we can work with 100-200 uL

Vortex Mixer (Vortex, Fisher Scientific, fisher scientific vortex mixer) Centrifuge 5418 (Centrifuge, Eppendorf US, Catalog No. 5401000137, https://www.eppendorf.com/us-en/eShop-Products/Centrifugation/Microcentrifuges/Centrifuge-5418R-p-5401000137 ) CentriVap (Benchtop Centrifugal Vacuum Concentrator, Labconco, 7810010)

2 mL Qiagen sample tubes (catalog no. 990381) Shallow polypropylene 96-well plate (Cat. No. 951040048) Deep polypropylene 96-well plate (Cat. No. 951033405) Seal plates (Cat. No. ZAFPE50) Note: for LC-MS/MS acquisition AlumaSeal CS (Sealing Foil, Excel Scientific) (Cat. No. FC100) Note: for long time storage

Methanol, Optima™ LC/MS Grade, Fisher Chemical Fisher Scientific Catalog #A456-4 (CAS: 67-56-1) Extraction solvent (100% methanol) containing 1uM sulfamethazine (CAS 57-68-1) as an internal standard. Resuspension solvent (50:50 v/v methanol:water) containing 1uM sulfadimethoxine (CAS 122-11-2) as an internal standard.
